title: Patterns in the Ash
description: A partial encyclopedia article lists three ingredients on the same aspect. Use the supporting clues to identify the fourth.

hints.text: The article on the G aspect has three known entries: ingredients [1, 3, 8] all have G+. There are exactly 4 alchemicals with G+. The fourth must be one of: [2, 4, 5, 6, 7]. Use the other clues to eliminate candidates.

Eliminate candidates:
  — ingredient 2: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 4: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 5: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 6: eliminated (book clue: solar)
  — ingredient 7: survives
Only ingredient 7 remains. It is alchemical Ppn, which has G+. It is the missing fourth entry.
